raw_description:
Prime Beachfront Location:Address Beach Resort Fujairah in Fujairah offers a private beach area and beachfront access. Guests enjoy sea views, a year-round outdoor swimming pool, and a terrace.Comfortable Accommodations:Rooms feature air-conditioning, private bathrooms, balconies, and sea views. Additional amenities include minibars, work desks, and free WiFi.Dining Experience:The family-friendly restaurant serves seafood with a traditional and modern ambience. Breakfast is continental, and lunch and dinner are available.Leisure and Wellness:The resort offers spa facilities, a fitness centre, and fitness classes. Free on-site private parking and scuba diving are available nearby.Guest Satisfaction:Highly rated for its attentive staff, beach access, and room cleanliness.

Couples particularly like the location — they rated it9.3for a two-person trip.

Distance in property description is calculated using © OpenStreetMap
description: Experience clinical levels of high-end luxury at Address Beach Resort Fujairah. Located conveniently in its prime location, this property features 11 key amenities including 3 swimming pools, Beachfront, Free WiFi.
